parameters.query:
SELECT
    COUNT(s.SH_ID) AS total_shipments_created,

    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN st.Current_Status = 'DELIVERED'
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS delivered_shipments,

    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN st.Current_Status != 'DELIVERED'
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS not_delivered_shipments,

    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN s.SH_DOMAIN = 'Domestic'
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS domestic_shipments,

    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN s.SH_DOMAIN = 'International'
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS international_shipments,

    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN s.SER_TYPE = 'Express'
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS express_shipments,

    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN s.SER_TYPE = 'Regular'
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS regular_shipments,

    SUM(s.SH_CHARGES) AS total_shipment_charges_collected,

    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN p.Payment_Status != 'PAID'
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS pending_payments_count

FROM shipment_details s

LEFT JOIN status st
ON s.SH_ID = st.SH_ID

LEFT JOIN payment_details p
ON s.SH_ID = p.SH_ID;
